data.name: After downloading, you may want to learn how to
data.value: 下载完成后，您可能需要了解如何

data.name: burn the ISO to a USB drive
Enjoy your new OS!
data.value: 尽情享受您的新操作系统吧！

data.name: Feeling generous? AnduinOS works based on donations from users. We are grateful for your support.
data.value: 想要支持我们？AnduinOS 的运营依赖用户捐赠。感谢您的慷慨相助！

data.name: If you are new to AnduinOS, you may also want to check out the
data.value: 如果您是AnduinOS的新用户，可能还需要查看

data.name: Something not working? Have a suggestion? Post about it to discussion.
data.value: 遇到问题或有建议？欢迎到讨论区发帖交流！

data.name: Take a look at documentation, you may find your answers there.
data.value: 查阅文档，您可能会在那里找到答案。

data.name: After downloading the ISO file, you should verify its integrity to ensure it has not been tampered with.
data.value: 下载 ISO 文件后，您应验证文件的完整性，以确保其未被篡改。

data.name: On Linux or macOS, use the sha256sum command. On Windows, use 7-Zip.
data.value: 在 Linux 或 macOS 上，请使用 sha256sum 命令。在 Windows 上，请使用 7-Zip 软件。

data.name: Compare the output with the checksum provided on the release page (files ending with .sha256). If the checksums match, the ISO file is valid and untampered.
data.value: 请将命令输出结果与发布页面（文件以 .sha256 结尾）上提供的校验和进行比对。如果校验和一致，则说明 ISO 文件有效且未被篡改。

data.name: Create a bootable USB drive to install AnduinOS on your computer.
data.value: 创建可启动 U 盘，在您的计算机上安装 AnduinOS。

data.name: Learn how to create a bootable USB drive
data.value: 了解如何创建可启动 U 盘

data.name: Follow the steps below to get started with your new operating system.
data.value: 请按照以下步骤开始使用您的新操作系统。

data.name: . If the checksums match, the ISO file is valid and untampered.
data.value: 进行比对。如果校验和一致，则说明 ISO 文件有效且未被篡改。
